subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 742413075/240711744 is not a GRB
body:
Jacob Smith (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 742413075/240711744 at 17:51:10.05 UT
on 11 July 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely accidental."
